summary: Iter97 RETEST — All P1 issues fixed. pytest test_iter97_driver_kyc.py = 28/28 PASS (was 26/28). Schema bootstrap for ride_requests.vehicle_type confirmed via information_schema (column present). Admin Transport tab verified rendered between ads and payments with all 4 status counter cards. DriverKycForm renders all 5 sections with Submit disabled when empty. Smoke regression passing.

minor.issue: Warm latency ~1.81s (slightly above 1.5s target). Acceptable but worth monitoring.

critical_code_review_comments: Self-healing DDL in services/driver_kyc.py L49-L52 correctly uses IF NOT EXISTS for ride_requests.vehicle_type — idempotent on startup.
AdminPage.js L67 tab array entry + L129 conditional render for TransportDriversAdminTab are correctly wired.

Review request mentions 'navigate /transport' but there is no top-level /transport route — the module is accessed via /services → service-transport entry. Consider adding a top-level route alias if deep-linking is desired, otherwise update docs to /services.
TransportModule.js uses setMode('driver') tab (data-testid='mode-driver') — rendering DriverKycForm correctly when driverProfile.is_driver is false or kyc_status !== 'approved'.
test_credentials: admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024!, alice@japap.com / Test1234! — JWT-mint used to bypass Turnstile, JWT_SECRET from backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: pytest created Alice driver row + driver_kyc_decisions + notifications; module-scoped autouse fixture cleaned them afterwards. Verified clean state at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver KYC Phase 1 fully validated end-to-end. Backend: 28/28 pytest green. Frontend: admin Transport tab + DriverKycForm both render correctly. One minor perf note on /api/wheel/status latency ~1.8s — not blocking. Access path for driver form: /services → click service-transport tile → click Chauffeur tab (data-testid=mode-driver) → DriverKycForm with 5 sections appears.
rca of the issue: Both P1s from iter97 resolved: (1) ride_requests.vehicle_type added via self-healing DDL in driver_kyc.py startup → GET /api/transport/available returns 200 with [] when no pending rides exist. (2) AdminPage.js tabs array now contains transport entry with Car icon, and the conditional render block mounts TransportDriversAdminTab.
